issues.observed_evidence: Current course has ~240 exam concepts across 52 sections. V3 requires 416 subtopics (8 per section × 52) with 3 variants each = 1248 total.
issues.expected: 416 subtopics, 1248 exam variants per V3 invariant vector
issues.root_cause: V2 structure used 3-5 concepts per section; V3 mandates 8 (4 topics × 2 subtopics)
issues.impact: Sections do not meet V3 counting contract. Current content is a starting point, not the final target.
issues.fix: Multi-session effort: expand each section from current concept count to 8 subtopics. Prioritize by section order S1→S52.
verification: Count subtopics per section in section files

issues.observed_evidence: Existing course has 4 capstones (S13, S26, S39, S51). V3 requires 13 (12 level + 1 final) with gates at S4/S8/S13/S17/S21/S26/S30/S34/S39/S43/S47/S51/S52.
issues.expected: 13 capstones with defined gates and evidence requirements
issues.root_cause: V2 consolidated capstones to 4; V3 distributes them across 12 gates + 1 final
issues.impact: 9 capstone gates are missing (S4, S8, S17, S21, S30, S34, S43, S47, S52-FINAL). Students don't have intermediate project milestones.
issues.fix: Create capstone increment specifications for each of the 9 missing gates. Map to existing section content.
verification: Each capstone has gate_section, evidence_required, state

issues.observed_evidence: Current sections have varying exercise counts (typically 3-5 per section). V3 requires 24 per section (3 per subtopic × 8 subtopics).
issues.impact: Insufficient practice opportunities for mastery learning
issues.fix: Expand exercises as subtopics are expanded (linked to GLOBAL-V3-001)

issues.observed_evidence: V3 mandates: 'Coincidir en apellido, teléfono, email, dirección, distancia o transacciones es evidencia para revisión, no prueba de parentesco, colusión o fraude. Entity resolution, relationship evidence y risk triage son capas separadas.'
issues.expected: All content involving entity resolution, matching, or relationship scoring must clearly separate these three layers
issues.root_cause: Existing content (especially S22 rapidfuzz-entity) may conflate matching with relationship inference
issues.impact: Privacy/ethics violation risk if content implies that matching = fraud detection
issues.fix: Audit all sections touching entity resolution, matching, or scoring. Ensure 3-layer separation is explicit.
verification: Audit S22, S13, S30, S31, S34, S39, S52 for 3-layer separation

issues.observed_evidence: S01 has 4 exam concepts but V3 requires 8 subtopics (4 topics × 2 subtopics each). Missing: interpreter-selection, terminal-paths, git-branch-pr, ruff-config.
issues.expected: 8 subtopics with 3 variants each = 24 exam variants
issues.root_cause: V2 structure used 4 concepts per section; V3 mandates 8 (4×2)
issues.impact: Insufficient assessment coverage for V3 compliance
issues.fix: Expand to 8 subtopics by splitting T1 (Runtime → interpreter + terminal), T3 (Git → commits + branches/PR), T4 (Quality → gitignore + ruff/env). Add 4 new concept slugs + 12 new exam variants.

issues.observed_evidence: S01 has 3 We Do exercises. V3 requires 24 student exercises (3 per subtopic × 8 subtopics).
issues.expected: 24 exercises with starter, 2 hints, solution, edge cases, tests, feedback
issues.root_cause: V2 structure had 3 exercises per section; V3 mandates 24
issues.fix: Create 21 additional exercises across the 8 subtopics. Each exercise: E1 guided, E2 independent, E3 transfer.

issues.observed_evidence: S01 has 1 CodePlayground demo. V3 requires 8 demos (1 per subtopic).
issues.expected: 8 demos, one per subtopic, each executable in declared environment
issues.root_cause: Current CodePlayground has 1 demo per section, not per subtopic
issues.impact: Students can't interact with each subtopic's concept
issues.fix: Add 7 more demos or restructure to show multiple demos per section

issues.observed_evidence: S01 has 0 topic evaluations. V3 requires 4 (one per topic).
issues.root_cause: V2 had selfCheck (section-level quiz) but no per-topic evaluations
issues.impact: No formative assessment at topic level
issues.fix: Create 4 topic evaluation packages, each with 2 authentic tasks + rubric

issues.observed_evidence: V3 S01 T1 mentions REPL, exit codes, PATH. V3 T4 mentions Ruff, .env.example. Current content doesn't cover these.
issues.expected: Theory covers REPL, exit codes, PATH, Ruff, .env.example
issues.root_cause: Existing content was written for V2 scope which was narrower
issues.impact: Incomplete coverage of V3 T1 and T4 topics
issues.fix: Add theory blocks for REPL/exit-codes/PATH (T1) and Ruff/.env.example (T4)
verification: Theory blocks cover all V3 T1-T4 subtopics

issues.observed_evidence: V3 S01 project increment is 'esqueleto de CP-N1-A'. Existing You Do is 'Reproducible Data Environment'.
issues.root_cause: CP-N1-A concept didn't exist when S01 was written
issues.impact: Students don't know their repo will become CP-N1-A
issues.fix: Add note in You Do context referencing CP-N1-A
